name: maquette
description: Image-guided web design systems for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Image-guided web design systems for Codex
interface.longDescription: Create website brand kits, reusable component libraries, and implemented pages through an image_gen-first contract-driven workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $maquette to run Maquette's staged image-guided website workflow. For broad site or page requests, create any missing focused brand kit first, then any missing component library or focused component/composite coverage, including responsive navigation for pages with primary nav, then the requested page. Do not skip directly to page concepts when brand or component artifacts are absent.
